meta.title: Reference Cases | Waste Sorting and Recycling Project References | WEI LAN
meta.description: Review WEI LAN anonymized reference cases by product line, including plastic sorting, construction waste recycling, bulky waste processing, project background, site details, equipment scope, and video references.

bodyHtml:
Reference Cases

Reference cases map operating scenarios to recoverable outputs

Browse anonymized domestic reference cases by product line, then open each case detail for the project description, equipment scope, site conditions, project background, and overall video reference.

Super Optical Sorting System Construction and Bulky Waste Line 4 reference cases

Plastic Sorting

Plastic sorting references are organized by material scope, layout constraints, and operating data

Two domestic references cover a Haishu recyclable materials sorting center and a resource recovery center with digital cockpit.

View product line

Haishu District Reference | Plastic Sorting

Urban plastic sorting reference

Haishu District reference using GL01V2-9 to serve a 1M+ resident recycling network with compact AI plastic bottle sorting, precise category recognition, and real-time operating data.

  • Service area: 1M+ permanent residents in Haishu District
  • Footprint: 600 m² total occupied area
  • Output: up to 9 plastic bottle categories with live statistics
View case details

Anonymized Domestic Reference | Smart Recovery

Digital recovery workflow reference

Smart recovery center reference combining sorting modules, weighing, reporting, and remote management for mixed municipal waste streams.

  • Material: mixed recyclables and municipal waste
  • Configuration: sorting modules plus digital control
  • Detail includes: cockpit scope, site workflow, project background, video
View case details
>_MORE

C&D and Bulky Waste

Construction and bulky waste references are organized by process scope and recovered output

Review C&D utilization and compact bulky waste layouts covering aggregate recovery, light-material separation, and transfer-station preprocessing.

View product line

Anonymized Domestic Reference | C&D Waste

Aggregate recovery reference

Integrated crushing, screening, magnetic separation, and air separation setup for recycled aggregate and material recovery output.

  • Material: construction and decoration waste
  • Configuration: 70 t/h Lion One line
  • Detail includes: site conditions, equipment scope, project background, video
View case details

Anonymized Domestic Reference | Bulky Waste

Bulky waste preprocessing reference

Compact footprint scheme designed for project sites that need crushing, air separation, recyclable recovery, and baled output in one workflow.

  • Material: bulky waste and light mixed waste
  • Configuration: Lion One plus separation modules
  • Detail includes: transfer-station workflow, equipment scope, project background, video
View case details
⚙️MORE

Project Evaluation

Reference packs are structured around material fit, capacity, output, and service model

Before moving to technical proposal and quotation, overseas teams typically want to understand whether the reference matches their material, capacity, output target, and operating model.

01

Material fit records

Check whether the reference material mix, contamination level, and preprocessing conditions match the target project.

02

Capacity and layout records

Compare hourly throughput, available site area, and supporting utilities before sizing equipment for local operation.

03

Recovered output records

Review the recovered fractions, recycled product direction, and how the system supports value recovery goals.

04

Control and service records

Confirm monitoring scope, operator requirements, commissioning expectations, and long-running support arrangements.

Reference Request

Reference materials matched to waste stream, capacity, and output target

Share your waste type, country, target capacity, and expected output. WEI LAN can recommend the most relevant reference materials and the right product path for your project evaluation.

Request Reference Package Compare Product Lines
